name: total-recall
description: Restores previous browsing session after a crash, restart, or accidental close.
author: SYGN - Finland

scripts.release: node scripts/bump-version.js && mkdir -p release && zip -r release/total-recall-$(node -e "process.stdout.write(require('./manifest.json').version)").zip *.js *.html *.css *.json assets/wordlogo.png -x '*.test.js' -x 'package.json'
